# TYPE sglang:token_usage gauge
sglang:prompt_tokens_total 32768
sglang:generation_tokens_total 4096
sglang:token_usage 0.55
sglang:cache_hit_rate 0.62
sglang:num_running_reqs 12
sglang:num_used_tokens 24576
sglang:gen_throughput 187.5
sglang:num_queue_reqs 1
sglang:num_preemptions_total 0
sglang:kv_transfer_sent_bytes_total{connector="mooncake"} 52428800
sglang:kv_transfer_recv_bytes_total{connector="mooncake"} 52428800
